Interface IPansharpeningFilter2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to additional members that control a pansharpening filter.

[Guid("64FA96AD-E00F-4AA1-82F7-B7EA95648B18")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IPansharpeningFilter2 : IPansharpeningFilter

Properties

InfraredImage 

IRaster InfraredImage { get; set; }

Property Value

IRaster

MaximumPansharpeningCellsize

The maximum cellsize, in Pan image's SR, below which pansharpening will be applied.

double MaximumPansharpeningCellsize { get; set; }

Property Value

double

IRaster PanImage { get; set; }

Property Value

IRaster

PansharpeningType 

esriPansharpeningType PansharpeningType { get; set; }

esriPansharpeningType

Sharpen(double, ref double, ref double, ref double, ref double)

Applies pansharpening to a pixel (R, G, B, I).
